empirical_error.limits_of_detectability: The paper does not provide specific information on limits of detectability for the algorithm.
empirical_error.false_positives: The paper does not provide specific information on false positives for the algorithm.
empirical_error.false_negatives: The paper does not provide specific information on false negatives for the algorithm.
empirical_error.statistical_confidence: The paper does not provide specific information on statistical confidence of outcomes for the algorithm.

algorithmic_error.fuzziness_of_algorithms: The algorithm may encounter errors due to the complexity of highly duplicated sequences and the challenges in accurately measuring copy numbers of DUF1220 domains.
algorithmic_error.stochastic_processes: The algorithm may be influenced by stochastic processes inherent in the sequencing and alignment parameters used.
algorithmic_error.multi-threaded_executions: Errors may arise in dynamically parallelized multi-threaded executions due to the nature of the algorithm.
algorithmic_error.machine_learning_methodologies: Machine learning methodologies utilized in the algorithm may introduce variability in outcomes based on the training data and model.
